blended.narrative: Castle Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,064 ft. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
